detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TEST._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TEST.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TEST.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TEST.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TEST.sol#735)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(33).div(100)) (TEST.sol#823)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(67).div(100)) (TEST.sol#825)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TEST.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TEST.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TEST.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TEST.sol#933)
	TEST._rOwned (TEST.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TEST._takeTeam(uint256) (TEST.sol#945-953)
	- TEST._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TEST.sol#905-941)
	- TEST.balanceOf(address) (TEST.sol#491-495)
	- TEST.constructor() (TEST.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TEST.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TEST.sol#959)
	TEST._rTotal (TEST.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TEST._getCurrentSupply() (TEST.sol#1109-1121)
	- TEST._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TEST.sol#957-963)
	- TEST.constructor() (TEST.sol#425-455)
	- TEST.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TEST.sol#587-609)
